title: Comforting Robata-grilled South Indian Butter Wrap
description: Rich, fluffy, comforting South Indian dish featuring unsalted butter, robata-grill, gluten-free-friendly, wrapped in lotus-leaf wrap. Serve warm, straight from the grill.

ingredients.name: Lotus-leaf wraps (gluten-free)
ingredients.notes: available at most Indian grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, peas, and corn

instructions: Brush the grill with ghee or oil to prevent sticking.
Place a lotus-leaf wrap on the grill and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side.
Meanwhile, mix the idli rice, mixed vegetables, and spiced potatoes in a bowl.
Add a dollop of unsalted butter to the center of the wrap and top with the rice mixture.
Drizzle with coconut milk and sprinkle with salt, turmeric, and red chili powder.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve with a side of South Indian chutney.
Repeat with the remaining wraps and filling ingredients.
